narrative:
Munson Twp township has 5,437 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.3 percentage points.
